name: Chipotle Salsa#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until the liquid is reduced by one-third and tomato skins fall off (about 20 minutes).
4. Allow mixture to cool.
5. Puree in a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
6. Strain through a fine mesh strainer.
7. Serve chilled.
